summary: Generate mode: Tested 7 new backend features - Family Members CRUD (5 tests), Lead Assignment (3 tests), Maintenance Fees with discount/tax (4 tests), Telecaller Dashboard (2 tests), Telecaller Member Access (3 tests), General Report (2 tests), Transaction Report (4 tests), and Email Mandatory validation (2 tests). All 88 backend tests pass (62 existing + 26 new).

test_results.frontend: N/A - no frontend files to test

seed_data_creation: Dynamic test data with unique mobile numbers and UUIDs, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: New backend test file test_new_features.py covers: 1) Family Members CRUD - POST/GET /members/{id}/family, PUT/DELETE /family/{id}, GET /family. 2) Lead Assignment - POST /leads/assign, GET /leads/by-telecaller, GET /leads/unassigned. 3) Maintenance Fees - POST /maintenance-fees with discount_amount and tax_rate (capped at 5%), POST /maintenance-fees/{id}/pay creates payment record in payment history. 4) Telecaller Dashboard - GET /telecaller/dashboard returns stats (assigned_members, active_members, assigned_leads, new_leads, pending_followups). 5) Telecaller Member Access - GET /telecaller/members (essential fields only), GET /telecaller/members/{id}/details (includes payment_history, maintenance_fees, family_count, follow_ups). 6) Reports - GET /reports/general (members, revenue, leads, plan_distribution, monthly_revenue), GET /reports/transactions (with date/type/method filters and summary). 7) Email mandatory for member registration (422 error without email). Admin credentials: 9999999999/admin123, Telecaller: 8888888888/telecaller123.

features_verified.family_members_crud: Working - add/get/update/delete family members, family count updated on member
features_verified.lead_assignment: Working - assign multiple leads to telecaller, get by telecaller, get unassigned
features_verified.maintenance_fees: Working - discount and tax (0-5%) supported, payment creates record in payment history
features_verified.telecaller_dashboard: Working - stats endpoint for assigned members, leads, follow-ups
features_verified.telecaller_member_access: Working - limited fields for telecaller, detailed view with payment history
features_verified.general_report: Working - members, revenue, leads stats with plan distribution and monthly trend
features_verified.transaction_report: Working - filtered transactions with summary by payment method
features_verified.email_mandatory: Working - 422 validation error when email missing for member creation
